_comment: Skills intentionally absent from claude/rules/skill-domain-routing.md and claude/rules/skill-workflow-routing.md. Each entry MUST include a justification. CI router-coverage check ignores these names. Keep this list small — prefer routing additions over allowlist entries.

allowed.name: plans-kanban
allowed.reason: Dashboard launcher utility. Surfaced via UI hint, not by intent-routing.

allowed.name: project-management
allowed.reason: Orchestrator-internal skill invoked at finalize step of /ck:cook. Not user-driven.

allowed.name: project-organization
allowed.reason: Orchestrator-internal skill invoked by other skills for path/output organization. Not user-driven.

allowed.name: skill-creator
allowed.reason: Maintainer-tier skill for skill authoring. Routed via skill-creator workflow doc, not domain tree.

allowed.name: xia
allowed.reason: Maintainer-tier external repo study workflow. Documented in claude/rules/CLAUDE.md, not domain tree.

allowed.name: team
allowed.reason: Multi-session orchestration meta-skill. Activated explicitly per orchestration-protocol.md; not domain-routed.

allowed.name: scenario
allowed.reason: Meta-skill invoked by /ck:plan and /ck:predict for edge-case generation. Not user-driven.

allowed.name: git
allowed.reason: Conventional-commit utility invoked by /ck:ship and finalize step. Not domain-routed.

allowed.name: loop
allowed.reason: Meta-skill for autonomous iteration; activated by /ck:cook --loop and /ck:autoresearch. Workflow-only.

allowed.name: research
allowed.reason: Core workflow skill referenced in primary-workflow.md; intentionally not in domain decision trees (it's a workflow phase, not a domain action).

allowed.name: predict
allowed.reason: Pre-implementation review skill invoked from /ck:plan. Workflow-only, not domain-routed.

allowed.name: show-off
allowed.reason: Output presentation utility. Surfaced via /ck:cook outputs, not by intent.

allowed.name: bootstrap
allowed.reason: Project-init mega-skill; documented in README and bootstrap SKILL.md. Routes other skills internally; not domain-routed itself.

allowed.name: coding-level
allowed.reason: P2 cleanup pending — design-first migration to claudekit-cli config (tracked in #718). Remove allowlist entry after migration.

allowed.name: problem-solving
allowed.reason: P2 cleanup pending — part of meta-thinking trio audit (problem-solving / sequential-thinking / context-engineering). Tracked in epic #711.
